GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_NANITE_SYNTHESIS.title: Nanite Synthesis
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_STRIKE_CRAFT_DIRECTIVE: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Trigger all unit passives. Draw {DrawCount} card.
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_FIELD_IMPROVE.title: Field Improvement
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_SIMPLE_MISSILE.title: Simple Missile
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_RECYCLING.title: Recycling
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_DECOMPOSITION.title: Decomposition
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_DECOMPOSITION.descript: Recycle all Status and Curse cards in hand.
Gain {Amount} additional Max HP when reconstructing.
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_LASER.title: Laser
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_KINETIC_CANNON.title: Kinetic Cannon
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_MISSILE.title: Missile
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_MISSILE.description: [gold]Burst[/gold]. [gold]Recyclable {ReconstructValue}[/gold]. [gold]Improve Cost {ImproveCost}[/gold]. [gold]Multi-Upgrade {MaxUpgrades}[/gold]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_SHIELD_I.title: Generate Shield
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_SHIELD_I.description: [gold]Recyclable {ReconstructValue}[/gold] [gold]Improve Cost {ImproveCost}[/gold] [gold]Multi-Upgrade {MaxUpgrades}[/gold] [gold]Association[/gold]. Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Channel 1 Shield Generator Unit. Gain 1 Temporary Focus.
GRAY_TEMPEST_RECONSTRUCT_CHOOSE.descript: Reconstruct a card from the nanite swarm
GRAY_TEMPEST_IMPROVE_CHOOSE.description: Spend Gold to upgrade the chosen card
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_TARGETED_SEARCH.title: Targeted Search
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_TARGETED_SEARCH.descri: Draw 1 card. Choose 1 card from the draw pile and 1 from the discard pile to add to hand.
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_ASSIMILATE.title: Assimilate
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_ASSIMILATE.description: [gold]Kinetic[/gold]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If fatal, gain Max HP equal to the damage dealt.
GRAY_TEMPEST_TARGETED_SEARCH_CHOOSE_DRAW: Select a card from your draw pile
GRAY_TEMPEST_TARGETED_SEARCH_CHOOSE_DISC: Select a card from your discard pile
GRAY_TEMPEST_FIELD_UPGRADE_CHOOSE.descri: Select a card in your hand to permanently upgrade
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_SMALL_RESOURCES.title: Small Resources
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_SOME_RESOURCES.title: Some Resources
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_LARGE_RESOURCES.title: Large Resources
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_FIELD_UPGRADE.title: Field Upgrade
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_FIELD_UPGRADE.descript: [gold]One-Shot[/gold]. Permanently upgrade a card (deck version also upgrades).
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_TEMPORARY_ASSEMBLY.des: At the end of combat, add a random [gold]One-Shot[/gold] card to your deck.
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_MINING.title: Mining
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_MINING.description: [gold]Energy[/gold]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Add {ResourceCount} Tiny Resource{ResourceCount:ResourcePlural} to your hand.
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_TINY_RESOURCE.title: Tiny Resource
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_SIMPLE_IMPROVE.title: Simple Improve
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_SIMPLE_IMPROVE.descrip: [gold]One-Shot[/gold]. Improve a card in your hand.
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_SIMPLE_RECYCLE.title: Simple Recycle
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_SIMPLE_RECYCLE.descrip: [gold]One-Shot[/gold] [gold]Recycle[/gold]. Recycle up to {RecycleCount} card{RecycleCount:Plural} in your hand.
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_GUIDED_BOMBARDMENT.des: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Channel {BombardCount} Orbital Bombardment Unit{BombardCount:BombardPlural}.
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_COMPUTE_ALLOCATION.des: Evoke your rightmost Orb. Draw {DrawCount} cards.
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_ORBITAL_OVERLORD.title: Orbital Overlord
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_ORBITAL_OVERLORD.descr: Channel {CalculatedChannels} Orbital Bombardment Units (equal to the number you have channeled this combat).
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_ARMAGEDDON.title: Armageddon
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_ARMAGEDDON.description: Your Orbital Bombardment Units deal {Amount}% extra damage.
GRAY_TEMPEST_POWER_ARMAGEDDON_POWER.desc: Orbital Bombardment Units deal {Amount}% extra damage.
GRAY_TEMPEST_POWER_ARMAGEDDON_POWER.smar: Orbital Bombardment Units deal [blue]{Amount}%[/blue] extra damage.
At the start of your turn, Channel 1 Orbital Bombardment Unit.
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_GRAY_TEMPEST_STORM.des: [gold]Kinetic[/gold]. Deal damage equal to your current HP.
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_DOUBLE_CAST.title: Double Cast
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_DOUBLE_CAST.descriptio: Give a [gold]One-Shot[/gold] card in your hand Replay 1.
GRAY_TEMPEST_DOUBLE_CAST_CHOOSE.descript: Choose a One-Shot card to give Replay 1
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_REPAIR_ARMOR.title: Repair Armor
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_REDUNDANCY.title: Redundancy
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_BACKUP_POWER.title: Backup Power
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_LAUNCH_STRIKE_CRAFT.de: [gold]Recyclable {ReconstructValue}[/gold] [gold]Improve Cost {ImproveCost}[/gold] [gold]Multi-Upgrade {MaxUpgrades}[/gold] [gold]Association[/gold]. Gain 1 Temporary Focus. Channel {ChannelCount} Strike Craft Unit{ChannelCount:StrikeCraftPlural}.
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_TACTICAL_ADVANCE.title: Tactical Advance
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_TACTICAL_ADVANCE.descr: [gold]Recyclable {ReconstructValue}[/gold] [gold]Improve Cost {ImproveCost}[/gold] [gold]Multi-Upgrade {MaxUpgrades}[/gold] [gold]Association[/gold]. Gain {StrengthPower} Temporary Strength and {DexterityPower} Temporary Dexterity.
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_MEMORY_OPTIMIZATION.de: Exhaust a card from your hand. Add {Amount} Redundanc{Amount:RedundancyPlural} to your draw pile.
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_ADJUSTMENT.title: Adjustment
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_ADJUSTMENT.description: Lose 1 Orb Slot. Gain 1 Hand Size. At the start of each turn, draw {Cards} additional card{Cards:Plural}.
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_ORBITAL_DEBRIS_SCATTER: [gold]Burst[/gold]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. Exhaust all Status and Curse cards. For each card exhausted, Channel 1 Orbital Bombardment Unit.
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_CALIBRATED_SHOT.title: Calibrated Shot
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_CALIBRATED_SHOT.descri: [gold]Kinetic[/gold]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Hits} time{Hits:Plural}. Draw {DrawCount} card{DrawCount:Plural}. Gain 1 Temporary Focus.
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_GRAY_TEMPEST_LEGION.de: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Channel {ChannelCount} of each Unit type. Trigger all unit passives. Return this card to your hand.
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_COLOSSUS_PROJECT.title: Colossus Project
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_COLOSSUS_PROJECT.descr: Victory after your next turn ends.
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_CLEANUP.title: Cleanup
GRAY_TEMPEST_CARD_CLEANUP.description: Exhaust any number of cards in your hand. If you Exhaust at least 5 cards, add {RedundancyCount} Redundanc{RedundancyCount:Plural} to your hand.
GRAY_TEMPEST_CLEANUP_CHOOSE.description: Select cards to Exhaust (at least 5 for bonus Redundancy)
